<!doctype html> <html> <head> <title>{!! $metadata['title'] !!}</title> <meta charset="utf-8"/> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"/> <style> body { margin: 0; } </style> </head> <body> <script id="api-reference" @foreach($htmlAttributes as $attribute => $value) {{-- Attributes specified first override later ones --}} {!! $attribute !!}="{!! $value !!}" @endforeach data-url="{!! $metadata['openapi_spec_url'] !!}"> </script> <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@scalar/api-reference"></script> </body> </html>
